trend_signal: Rise in remote work and home office setups
stock_safe_concept: A clean, bright home office setup featuring a sleek desk, laptop, potted plants, and natural light from a window, styled with neutral tones and minimal decor.
buyer_use_cases: Blog or article illustrations about remote work
Marketing materials for office furniture brands
visual_elements: Minimalist decor items like notebook and pen
risk_notes: No identifiable logos or branded devices visible; no people included to avoid likeness issues.
score_reason: Highly relevant to current remote work trends, versatile use cases, visually appealing and safe for commercial use.

trend_signal: Growing interest in sustainable living and eco-conscious lifestyle
stock_safe_concept: A collection of zero-waste kitchen items arranged on a clean countertop: reusable glass jars, bamboo utensils, beeswax wraps, and cloth produce bags, with a rustic backdrop.
buyer_use_cases: Social media posts promoting zero-waste lifestyle
risk_notes: No brand labels on any products; no people or copyrighted packaging designs.
score_reason: Strong alignment with sustainability trend, niche but growing buyer interest, low risk of copyright infringement.

trend_signal: Tech innovation and AI integration in daily life
stock_safe_concept: Abstract digital visualization of a smart home control panel with icons for lighting, temperature, security, and entertainment, displayed on a transparent touchscreen device in a modern living room environment.
buyer_use_cases: Educational content on smart homes and IoT
visual_elements: Blue and white neon light accents
risk_notes: No real devices or brand interfaces shown; fully digital and conceptual art style to avoid copyright issues.
score_reason: Meets tech trends with futuristic appeal, broad commercial use potential, and no identifiable branding.

stock_safe_concept: A serene indoor corner designed for meditation featuring a yoga mat, cushions, candles, incense holder, and indoor plants with soft natural lighting and neutral colors.
buyer_use_cases: Mobile app backgrounds for meditation apps
risk_notes: No people or religious symbols; generic wellness props only.
score_reason: Strong relevance to wellness and mental health trends, safe and peaceful imagery with wide commercial appeal.

trend_signal: Increased interest in plant-based cooking and healthy eating
stock_safe_concept: Overhead view of a kitchen counter with fresh vegetables, grains, and herbs arranged around a cutting board with hands preparing a plant-based meal, no visible faces or identifying features.
visual_elements: Fresh vegetables (bell peppers, leafy greens, tomatoes)
risk_notes: No faces or identifiable people; no branded kitchen tools or product packaging.
score_reason: Aligns with health food and plant-based diet trends, very versatile for food-related commercial projects, and low risk of editorial or copyright constraints.
